title: Checkpoint Naming Service Directory
description: The 'checkpoint' directory in Hadoop MapReduce houses classes responsible for generating unique names for checkpoints. The 'RandomNameCNS.java' file implements the 'getNewName()' method of the 'CheckpointNamingService' interface, producing random alphanumeric names prefixed with 'checkpoint_'. The 'SimpleNamingService.java' file, also implementing 'CheckpointNamingService', generates names by appending 'checkpoint_' to a provided name during initialization. Both classes adhere to the 'CheckpointNamingService' interface, illustrating a strategy pattern where different naming strategies can be implemented and used interchangeably. This directory exemplifies the use of the Strategy design pattern, promoting flexibility and modularity in the checkpoint naming process.

raw_response:
TITLE: Checkpoint Naming Service Directory

DESCRIPTION: 
The 'checkpoint' directory in Hadoop MapReduce houses classes responsible for generating unique names for checkpoints. The 'RandomNameCNS.java' file implements the 'getNewName()' method of the 'CheckpointNamingService' interface, producing random alphanumeric names prefixed with 'checkpoint_'. The 'SimpleNamingService.java' file, also implementing 'CheckpointNamingService', generates names by appending 'checkpoint_' to a provided name during initialization. Both classes adhere to the 'CheckpointNamingService' interface, illustrating a strategy pattern where different naming strategies can be implemented and used interchangeably. This directory exemplifies the use of the Strategy design pattern, promoting flexibility and modularity in the checkpoint naming process.
